title: C2-D objective-level abstain — reproducible scan proving degenerate rows trip the criterion, eligible rows do not
abstain_criterion_formula: abstain ⟺ max_q O < O_floor (=0.1) OR min|r| > r_tol (=0.66°) OR cond(H) > κ_cond_max (=100), all read from frozen properties of O; no `if f_par_obs<R22` branch.
